name: oh-my-grok
description: OMC/OMX-style multi-agent orchestration for Grok Build: global guidance injection (~/.grok/rules/omg.md), skills, agents, ledger hooks, self-healing install/update/uninstall, notepad, kill switches. Pair with the omg CLI for hard keywords (ulw/ralph/ralplan/resume), setup, and outer persistence loops.
